action: Reconcile accepted additive continuity records with the canonical queue while preserving prior states and other teams' records.

completed_slice.finding: The canonical queue and additive execution records are distinct state layers; current queue projection lags committed continuity work.

required_evidence: linked additive proposal and continuity record commits
acceptance_test: A reader can determine what is canonical, what was merely proposed, what work was actually committed, and what remains unresolved without treating additive artifacts as automatic queue mutations.
privacy_boundary: Public repository paths, blob SHAs, commit SHAs, and abstract coordination state only; no private chat, health material, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads.
next_action: Adopt M-002 into ACTIVE_QUEUE.json through a conflict-aware update or implement a deterministic reconciliation artifact that produces a reviewable canonical projection without overwriting other teams.
